meta.title: Custom websites for small businesses · Karolína Katriňáková
meta.description: I design and code custom websites for small businesses. Click any of the 7 demos to explore — yours will be designed entirely around your business.
hero.label: My website portfolio
hero.sub: Custom websites for small businesses. Below are 7 fully working demos — click around as much as you like. Yours will look different — designed around your business, your customers and your goals.
demo_strip.title: Everything below is fully clickable.
demo_strip.text: Each demo is a real, working website I built from scratch — booking flows, schedules, shopping carts, forms, three languages. Click around as long as you'd like. Yours won't look like any of these — it'll be designed entirely around your business.
intro.label: About me
intro.title: A solo studio with a marketing brain
intro.text: Every project gets my full attention from first sketch to launch — no handoffs, no junior teams. I try to build websites that actually help your business grow, not just look pretty. Yours will be fast, lightweight, owned by you (no monthly platform fees) and designed specifically around how your customers think.
intro.b1: Custom-coded — no Wix, no WordPress, no template lock-in.
intro.b2: UX research before design: I study your industry & best-in-class.
intro.b3: Plain, warm copy in 3 languages — written from a marketing brain.
intro.b4: You own everything: domain, code, photos. No subscriptions.
services.label: Services
services.title: Everything you need, from one person.
services.lead: Strategy, design, code, copy and care — done by me, end to end. No handoffs, no agency overhead.
services.s1.title: Strategy & UX
services.s1.text: I study your industry, your competitors and the best sites in the world in your sector — then design around what actually wins customers.
services.s2.title: Custom design & build
services.s2.text: A look that's only yours — no template, no Wix, no monthly fees. Fast, light, mobile-first, and yours to keep forever.
services.s3.title: Copy that converts
services.s3.text: Plain, warm words written from a marketing background — so visitors understand what you offer in 5 seconds and want to book.
services.s4.title: Be found locally
services.s4.text: Google Maps listing, on-page SEO, structured data — so when someone nearby searches for what you offer, you show up first.
services.s5.title: Three languages
services.s5.text: Tourists, expats, cross-border clients — one click and your whole site speaks their language. Just like this one (try EN/SK/CS up top).
services.s6.title: Ongoing care
services.s6.text: A real human to write to. Edits, fresh photos, content updates, small tweaks — only when you actually need them.
services.meta_title: Services · Custom websites for small businesses
services.meta_description: Strategy, design, code, copy and care — done by one person, end to end.
services.hero_sub: Strategy, design, code, copy and care — done by me, end to end. No handoffs.
services.s1.text_long: Before any pixel, I research your sector — your competitors, the best-in-class sites worldwide, what your customers expect, what tends to convert. The design comes out of strategy, not the other way around.
services.s1.good: Good for: any project. UX research is the foundation of everything else.
services.s2.text_long: Your website is custom-coded just for you. No Wix, no Squarespace, no WordPress, no monthly platform fees. It's fast, light, mobile-first, accessible, SEO-ready — and yours to keep forever.
services.s2.good: Good for: businesses who want a real website without recurring software fees.
services.s3.text_long: Plain, warm words written from a marketing background. I know what tends to land in 5 seconds (because that's all visitors give you) and what feels like noise. If writing about your own business feels strange, I'll draft it.
services.s3.good: Good for: people who'd rather not stare at a blank Google Doc.
services.s4.text_long: Google Maps listing, on-page SEO, schema/structured data, sitemap, Search Console — so when someone in your area searches for what you offer, you show up. Address, hours and contacts stay consistent across every platform.
services.s4.good: Good for: businesses where most clients live nearby — cafés, salons, clinics, studios.
services.s5.text_long: Tourists, expats, cross-border clients — your whole site can speak their language with one click. Same content, three languages (or more), one toggle. Just like this website.
services.s5.good: Good for: border-region businesses, B&Bs, photographers, anyone in tourism.
services.s6.text_long: An optional monthly slot to keep your site fresh — minor edits, new photos, content updates, small tweaks. No commitment, no minimum term. We talk and figure out what's actually useful.
services.s6.good: Good for: businesses that change often (menus, schedules, prices) and want a real human to ask.
services.cta_text: Write to me and we'll see if it makes sense.
features.label: Features
features.title: What your website can include.
features.lead: Pick what your business actually needs, skip the rest. The website itself is custom-coded — no Wix, no WordPress, no heavy templates. For payments, bookings and emails I plug in proven third-party platforms — picked per project — so your data stays safe and things just work.
features.f1.title: Online booking & payment
features.f1.text: Booking system with calendar, capacity and cancellation rules. Card payment, automatic email confirmations. Through a trusted booking platform — or a custom solution like in the Aria demo.
features.f2.title: Online shop & cart
features.f2.text: Products, variants, delivery zones, cart and checkout. Through a trusted e-commerce platform — chosen by scale and needs. Like in the Stem florist demo.
features.f3.title: Weekly schedule
features.f3.text: A weekly schedule grid you update yourself. Clients see what's free and filter by class, teacher or room. Try it on Aria.
features.f4.title: 3+ languages
features.f4.text: One click switches the entire site. Perfect for tourist towns, B&Bs, photographers, border-region businesses.
features.f5.title: Galleries & lookbooks
features.f5.text: Filterable, full-screen, before/after — whatever shows your work best. See Rove (photo) and Lumi (salon).
features.f6.title: Customer accounts
features.f6.text: Login, booking history, passes and credits. Clients come back more often when the site remembers them.
features.f7.title: Menus & reservations
features.f7.text: Tasting menus, daily specials, allergens, 3-step reservations. See Sála (restaurant) and Luna (café).
features.f8.title: Card payment & passes
features.f8.text: Card payment through a trusted, secure payment provider. Single visits, multi-class passes, gift cards, subscriptions.
features.f9.title: Maps & directions
features.f9.text: Live Google Maps, opening hours, parking notes, public-transport stops, click-to-call.
features.f10.title: Blog / journal
features.f10.text: Easy-to-update articles for SEO and brand voice. You write in plain text, the site stays beautiful.
features.f11.title: Forms & lead capture
features.f11.text: Wedding inquiries, contact forms, quote requests — straight to your inbox, with anti-spam.
features.f12.title: Reviews & testimonials
features.f12.text: Selected reviews shown on your site + a button to your Google reviews. Social proof builds trust faster than anything else.
features.f13.title: SEO & analytics
features.f13.text: On-page SEO, sitemap, schema, GA4 / Plausible, Search Console — set up properly from day one.
features.f14.title: Mobile-first, accessible
features.f14.text: 90%+ of small-business traffic is mobile. I design for the phone first, then expand. WCAG-friendly.
features.f15.title: Emails & newsletter
features.f15.text: Contact form → straight to your inbox. Optional newsletter through a trusted email platform — whichever fits you best.
features.f16.title: Something else?
features.f16.text: If you can describe it, it's probably doable. Loyalty programs, memberships, integrations — just ask.
process.label: How it works
process.title: From first message to live site.
process.lead: Four honest steps. No surprises, no upsells, no agency runaround. You always know what's happening and what comes next.
process.p1.title: A quick call
process.p1.text: You tell me about your business, your customers and your goals. I listen, ask questions and share what tends to work in your sector. No pressure, no commitment.
process.p2.title: Research & fixed quote
process.p2.text: I look at your competitors and the best-in-class sites in your sector. Then I send a written scope and a fixed price — in plain language, no hourly games.
process.p3.title: Design & build
process.p3.text: I design the site, write the copy, and code it from scratch. You see progress every few days and we refine together. Most projects launch in 2–4 weeks.
process.p4.title: Launch & care
process.p4.text: We go live, set up your domain & analytics and make sure everything works. Optional monthly care so you don't have to think about updates, fixes or hosting.
why.label: How I work
why.title: One person, building around your business
why.lead: Most small businesses don't need a five-person agency or a template that looks like everyone else's. They need someone who actually listens, builds, and stays around. Here's how that's different in practice.
why.mine.title: One person, start to finish
why.mine.l1: Same person designs, writes, codes and maintains the site
why.mine.l2: Built around your customers, not a template
why.mine.l3: You write to me directly — no account managers, no tickets
why.mine.l4: Small changes happen in days, not weeks
why.mine.l5: You own everything: code, content, hosting
why.ag.title: Five people, lots of meetings
why.ag.l1: A team of five-plus: PM, designer, copywriter, dev, account manager
why.ag.l2: Most of the budget goes to coordination, not building
why.ag.l3: You speak with account managers, not with the people building it
why.ag.l5: Post-launch tweaks go through a ticket queue
portfolio.label: Demos
portfolio.title: 7 demo sites you can fully click through.
portfolio.lead_strong: Yours won't look like any of these.
portfolio.lead_text: These are live demos — they're here to show what's possible. Your site will be designed entirely around your business, your customers and your goals.
portfolio.footnote: None of these is your business. Your site will be different — different colours, different structure, different features, different voice. These exist to show what's possible. Tell me about your business and I'll sketch what yours could look like.
portfolio.p1.title: Lumi
portfolio.p1.text: 4-step online booking, full price book, stylist profiles, before/after gallery.
portfolio.p2.title: Luna
portfolio.p2.text: Full menu with allergens, events calendar, daily specials, reservation form.
portfolio.p3.title: Mend
portfolio.p3.text: Filterable conditions library, 4-step booking, insurance/Multisport info, FAQ.
portfolio.p4.title: Rove
portfolio.p4.text: Editorial portfolio, filterable gallery with full-screen lightbox, journal, inquiry.
portfolio.p5.title: Stem
portfolio.p5.text: Online shop, delivery checker, cart, subscriptions, weddings inquiry, workshops.
portfolio.p6.title: Aria
portfolio.p6.text: Live booking system, weekly schedule, capacity tracking, card payment, passes.
portfolio.p7.title: Sála
portfolio.p7.text: Interactive 7-course tasting menu, wine list, 3-step reservations, press wall.
portfolio.meta_title: Demos · Custom websites for small businesses
portfolio.meta_description: 7 demo sites I built from scratch. Click any one to explore — yours will be designed entirely around your business.
portfolio.hero_sub: These are live demos — they're here to show what's possible. Your site will be designed entirely around your business, your customers and your goals.
portfolio.cta_title: What kind of business do you run?
portfolio.cta_text: If you have a service and customers, I'd love to hear from you.
portfolio.wRest.text: A neighbourhood restaurant on Vinohradská. Three pages — a striking opening with the chef's words, a 7-course tasting menu where each course has its own large photo, a wine list, awards from food guides (Michelin · Gault Millau · La Liste), the chef's story, a private dining room, and a simple reservation in three steps. Inspired by the world's most beautiful restaurant sites — Eleven Madison Park, Frantzén, Maison François, Septime, Atelier Crenn, Noma, St. John, Le Bernardin, Geranium, Single Thread.
portfolio.w1.text: A premium salon site with four pages — home, full price list, profiles of each stylist with their story and speciality, and an online booking in four steps. Each stylist also has a before / after gallery showing real client transformations.
portfolio.w2.text: A magazine-style site for a roastery with four pages — home, full menu, events calendar and a real reservation form. With today's specials, a featured coffee of the month, weekly natural-wine evenings, supper clubs and coffee tastings. Equally suited to bistros and roasters.
portfolio.w3.text: A warm, professional clinic site with three pages — home, a list of conditions you can filter (back, knee, post-op, sport, neck, pregnancy), and an online booking in four steps with a confirmation. Plus insurance & Multisport info and a FAQ section.
portfolio.w4.text: A photo-led portfolio for a fine-art wedding and portrait photographer. Three pages — home with full case studies, a portfolio gallery you can filter where photos open full-screen, and a journal (blog). Restrained, dark, deliberate.
portfolio.w5.text: A botanical, hand-crafted website with four pages — home with seasonal flowers, a shop with delivery check, filters by occasion and a sample cart, a weddings page with featured work and an inquiry form, and a workshops calendar. Romantic, with elegant italic typography.
portfolio.w6.text: A movement-studio site with four pages — home with the studio's manifesto, an interactive weekly schedule where you book directly from the timetable, four detailed class pages (Vinyasa, Yin, Pilates, Breath), and a landing page for the €25 first-week intro pass. Calm and grounded, with bold display type.
pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Fixed quote, no hourly games.
pricing.lead: Every business needs something different — some need one page, some a shop, some a booking system. After our first call I send a written, fixed quote. You always know what you're getting and what it costs.
pricing.meta_title: Pricing · Custom websites for small businesses
pricing.meta_description: Pricing is fixed and quoted individually based on your project.
pricing.hero_sub: After our first call you get a written, fixed price. You always know what you're getting and what it costs.
pricing.body1: I don't have fixed packages because every small business is different. Some need a one-page site, some a five-page multilingual build, some need a booking system or a shop. The price depends on what we're actually making — and I quote it upfront.
pricing.step1: You write to me with a few words about your business and what you'd like.
pricing.step2: We jump on a quick call or trade emails — phone, video or text, whatever's easier.
pricing.step3: I send a written scope and a fixed price. No surprises, no hourly games.
pricing.step4: If it's a yes, we start. If it's a no, no harm done.
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: A few things you might be wondering.
faq.q0: Are these demos real client websites?
faq.a0: No. They're live demos I built from scratch to show what's possible. Real client work stays private. Your site will be entirely your own — different colours, structure, features and voice.
faq.a5: Most small-business sites go live in 2–4 weeks. Bigger projects with shops, booking systems or memberships take 4–8 weeks. You'll get a clear timeline in the quote.
faq.q6: Will it look like one of the demos above?
faq.a6: No — and that's the point. Every site is designed from a blank canvas around your business. The demos just show what's technically possible (booking, shop, multilingual, schedule, etc.). Yours will be its own thing.
faq.q1: I already have a domain and an old website. Can we keep them?
faq.a1: Yes. We can keep your domain and either redesign on top of what you have or move you to something new — depending on the setup. We'll figure it out on the first call.
faq.q2: What if I don't have any photos yet?
faq.a2: No problem. For the first version we can use beautiful free photos (like the ones on this site). Later, when you're ready, we swap them for your own.
faq.q7: What if my business isn't in the demos?
faq.a7: It probably isn't — there are a million kinds of small businesses and only 7 demos here. Write to me, tell me what you do, and I'll show you sites I'd reference for your sector and what I'd build.
faq.a4: Just hosting and domain (around €5–10 / month, paid directly to the providers). No platform fees to me, ever. Optional monthly care if you want a real human on call for edits.
cta_band.title: Tell me about your business.
cta_band.text: No pressure, no commitment. Just a short conversation about what you'd like to make — I'll show you what I'd build and roughly what it would cost. If it's not a fit, no harm done.
cta_band.sub: Reply within 48 hours · EN · SK · CS
contact.meta_title: Contact · Custom websites for small businesses
contact.meta_description: Tell me about your business — I reply within 48 hours, in English, Slovak or Czech.
contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Tell me about your business.
contact.text: Write a few words about what you do and what you'd like to make. I'll reply within 48 hours.
contact.heading: Contact
contact.form.note: After you click send, your email app will open with a pre-filled message. If nothing happens, just write to karolina.katrinakova@gmail.com.
contact.form.name: Your name
contact.form.message: A few words about your project
cookies.text: This site only saves your language choice and your answer to this banner — both stored in your browser. No tracking, no analytics.
privacy.meta_description: How this site handles your data — short and plain.
privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.title: A short, plain privacy note
privacy.intro: This is a small portfolio site. I don't run analytics, ads or any tracking. Your visit isn't recorded anywhere.
privacy.p_cookies: Two tiny things, kept only in your browser: your chosen language (EN, SK or CS), and your answer to the cookie banner. That's all — nothing is sent to me or anyone else.
privacy.p_contact: If you email me or send the contact form, your message arrives in my inbox. I use it only to reply. I don't share it with anyone and I don't sign you up to any newsletter.
privacy.p_rights: Email me at karolina.katrinakova@gmail.com any time and I'll tell you what (if anything) I have stored about you, or delete it.
